query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'box_goods' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE();
SELECT id, name, image_url FROM box_goods LIMIT 3;
